# SahayakAI

> The Operating System for Teaching in India

SahayakAI is an AI-powered teaching assistant built for India's 1.01 crore (10.1 million) K-12 teachers. It is a product of SARGVISION, founded by Sarit Arora.

## What SahayakAI Does

SahayakAI reduces lesson preparation time by 90% (from 45 minutes to under 5 minutes). It generates curriculum-aligned lesson plans, quizzes, worksheets, rubrics, and assessments across all Indian education boards — NCERT, CBSE, ICSE, and all 28 state boards.

## Key Capabilities

- AI Lesson Plan Generator: Creates complete, board-aligned lesson plans in under 2 minutes
- Quiz & Assessment Generator: Auto-generates quizzes mapped to specific chapters and learning objectives
- Worksheet Creator: Printable, curriculum-aligned worksheets with answer keys
- Rubric Builder: Standards-based rubrics for any subject and grade
- Visual Aid Generator: Creates teaching visuals, diagrams, and illustrations
- Virtual Field Trips: AI-generated immersive educational experiences
- Video Storyteller: Creates educational video narratives
- Parent Communication: AI-drafted parent messages in local languages
- Voice-to-Text: Voice input for teachers who prefer speaking over typing
- Instant Answer: Real-time curriculum doubt resolution for teachers
- Teacher Training: Personalized professional development content
- Attendance Management: Student attendance tracking with parent outreach
- AI Teaching Avatar: Interactive AI teaching companion (VIDYA)
- Exam Paper Generator: Complete exam papers with marking schemes
- Text-to-Speech: Content narration in Indian languages

## Languages Supported

SahayakAI works natively (not translated) in 11 Indian languages: English, Hindi, Kannada, Tamil, Telugu, Marathi, Bengali, Gujarati, Punjabi, Malayalam, and Odia.

## Technical Architecture

- Progressive Web App (PWA) — works offline, installable on any device
- Voice-first interface — optimized for voice input (65% of Indian users prefer voice)
- Low-bandwidth optimized — functional on 2G/3G networks common in rural India
- Built on Next.js 15 with server-side rendering
- AI powered by Google Gemini 2.0 Flash via Genkit
- Firebase for authentication and real-time data
- Firestore with offline persistence for seamless offline-to-online sync

## Curriculum Coverage

50,000+ curriculum mappings across:
- NCERT (National Council of Educational Research and Training)
- CBSE (Central Board of Secondary Education)
- ICSE (Indian Certificate of Secondary Education)
- All 28 state education boards
- Classes 1 through 12 (K-12)
- All major subjects

## Pricing

- Free Tier: 50 AI credits per month
- Gold: Rs 149/teacher/month (500 credits)
- Premium: Rs 349/teacher/month (2000 credits)
- Institutional pricing available for schools, chains, and government departments

## Traction

- 150-teacher Karnataka pilot program
- 78% teacher retention rate
- 30 features in production
- NPS score of 71+
